name: @softspark/ai-toolkit
description: Professional-grade AI coding toolkit: 92 skills, 44 agents, multi-platform support (Claude, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, Gemini, Cline, Roo Code, Aider, Augment, Google Antigravity), machine-enforced safety constitution, persona presets, skill security auditor, expanded lifecycle hooks, 11 plugin packs, and benchmark tooling.
author: SoftSpark <biuro@softspark.eu>

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run generate:all && python3 scripts/validate.py && npm test
scripts.generate:llms: python3 scripts/generate_llms_txt.py > llms.txt && python3 scripts/generate_llms_txt.py --full > llms-full.txt
scripts.generate:all: npm run generate:agents && npm run generate:cursor && npm run generate:windsurf && npm run generate:copilot && npm run generate:gemini && npm run generate:cline && npm run generate:roo && npm run generate:aider && npm run generate:llms

engines.bats: >=1.8.0 — install via: brew install bats-core (macOS) or apt install bats (Ubuntu)
